summary: i18n Testing - Critical issues found. Landing page and tab bar use English correctly (browser-detected). However, home screen and side menu show Italian text despite English being selected. Root cause: Multiple hardcoded Italian strings remain in the code, and the language screen header is hardcoded as 'Lingua' instead of using t('language').

ui_bugs.issue: Header shows hardcoded 'Lingua' instead of using i18n translation
Hardcoded Italian 'Hai fatto X punti su 10 partite' on line 436
Hardcoded Italian 'Nessuna giornata in programma' on line 482

integration_issues.issue: Language page title remains 'Lingua' regardless of selected language

action_items: Replace hardcoded 'Lingua' in /app/frontend/app/menu/language.tsx line 35 with t('language') and import useTranslation's t function
Replace hardcoded 'Giornata ${data.matchday.number}' in home.tsx line 449 with translation key like t('home.matchday_label') + ' ' + data.matchday.number
Replace hardcoded '${totalMatches} partite' in home.tsx line 197 with translation
Replace hardcoded 'Hai fatto ${val} punti su 10 partite' in home.tsx line 436 with translation
Replace hardcoded 'Nessuna giornata in programma' in home.tsx line 482 with translation key like t('home.no_matchday_scheduled')
critical_code_review_comments: language.tsx line 35: Hardcoded 'Lingua' - should use {t('language')} with useTranslation hook
home.tsx contains 4+ hardcoded Italian strings that bypass the i18n system
Admin screens (/app/frontend/app/admin/*) contain many hardcoded Italian strings - not critical but should be fixed for consistency
context_for_next_testing_agent: i18n refactoring incomplete. Landing page and tab bar work correctly with browser language detection. Side menu and home screen have hardcoded Italian strings that need to be replaced with t() calls. Language screen header is hardcoded as 'Lingua'. Test user has 'language: it' in their profile but the app should respect the language selected via UI (which saves to localStorage as APP_LANGUAGE).

home_screen.notes: Should show English but shows Italian due to hardcoded strings

side_menu.notes: Side menu items use t() correctly but current selected language appears to be Italian. Language screen shows English is selected but side menu shows Italian - possible state sync issue

working: All three languages available (Italiano, English, Español)
